_format_note: Chain wire / security fencing as supplied by Amazing Fencing. Galvanised + PVC-coated (green/black) options. SKU detail not enumerated on the install-side site; this seed is skeletal pending the supply-side chainwire catalogue.

products.name: Amazing Fencing — Chain Wire & Security
products.description: Chain wire fencing for residential and commercial. Raw galvanised + PVC-coated options (green or black). Customisable for unusual terrain or layouts. Optional aluminium garden-fence variant.
